heading: Deposits and disbursements under special deposit account
label: 2045 Deposits and disbursements under special deposit account
text: Deposits and disbursements under such special deposit account (1) shall be made by the Architect, or, when directed by him, by such employees of the Architect as he may designate, and (2) shall be subject to audit by the Government Accountability Office at such times and in such manner as the Comptroller General may direct: , That payments made by or under the direction of the Architect of the Capitol from such special deposit account shall be conclusive upon all officers of the Government.Provided
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 174j–5 of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002
Amendments2004— substituted “Government Accountability Office” for “General Accounting Office”.Pub. L. 108–271
